##RRUFFID=R150137
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Fe^2+^_3_(AsO_4_)_2_·8H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Kiura Mine, Oita Pref., Kyushu Island, Japan
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Jeremie Pfister
##DESCRIPTION=Aggregates of dark-bluish grey euhedral crystals, associated with smoky scorodite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
